name: ExtensionSubstanceNucleicAcid_NumberOfSubunits
title: R5: The number of linear sequences of nucleotides linked through phosphodiester bonds shall be described. Subunits would be strands of nucleic acids that are tightly associated typically through Watson-Crick base pairing. NOTE: If not specified in the reference source, the assumption is that there is 1 subunit (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceNucleicAcid.numberOfSubunits` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceNucleicAcid.numberOfSubunits` 0..1 `integer`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `SubstanceNucleicAcid.numberOfSubunits` 0..1 `integer`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceNucleicAcid.numberOfSubunits` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubstanceNucleicAcid` is not mapped.
Element `SubstanceNucleicAcid.numberOfSubunits` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
